---
name: Security advisory
about: STOP - report security issues privately
title: "[security] DO NOT FILE PUBLICLY"
---

**Please do not file security issues through GitHub Issues.**

Email: febriansyahd65@gmail.com with subject `[goforge] security advisory`.

We follow the disclosure process documented in
[SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md). You will receive an acknowledgement
within 72 hours.
